name: codex-usage-pet
description: A tiny Windows desktop pet that shows your remaining Codex allowance.

interface.shortDescription: Remaining Codex allowance in a tiny desktop pet
interface.longDescription: Launch a small always-on-top Tail Meter pet whose badge and seven tail dots show the remaining percentage in your current 5-hour Codex window. Click it for 5-hour and weekly remaining allowance, reset countdowns, and secondary token activity. It can open with Codex and restores its last position and size.
defaultPrompt: Make my Codex usage pet open automatically with Codex.
